summary: Closed M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 after PR #28 merged into main at 5dac323b7dbd5dfa3d2de6f228bb76c67f32c96b. The M2 map fixture source policy is integrated, both task subthreads are closed, and M2-WORLD-FIXTURE-001 is the next READY task.

tests_run.result: PR #28 MERGED into main with merge commit 5dac323b7dbd5dfa3d2de6f228bb76c67f32c96b.
HEAD/main/origin/main at 5dac323 docs(research): define M2 map fixture source policy (#28).
M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 is CLOSED and M2-WORLD-FIXTURE-001 is READY.

decisions: Close M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 only after confirming PR #28 entered main.
Clear active task threads after close_agent returned completed statuses for historical_researcher and qa_reviewer.
Promote M2-WORLD-FIXTURE-001 to READY as the next dependency-satisfied M2 task; do not start implementation in this closure commit.
risks: M2-WORLD-FIXTURE-001 must follow the newly integrated source policy and still requires its own simulation_engineer handoff and systems_architect review before integration.
M1 follow-up risks remain active until M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 and M2-BOOT-BOUNDARY-001 are completed.
requested_action: After this closure commit is integrated, start M2-WORLD-FIXTURE-001 with simulation_engineer under the current model-routing matrix.
